content: Phase 2: Build multi-tenant backend (auth, schools, students, fees, payments, attendance, etc.)
Phase 2: Seed 3 schools + demo users + sample students/classes/fees/attendance
Phase 2: Build frontend - core (index.css, App.js, contexts, layout, login, dashboard)

Phase 2: All user stories covered - visible dashboards, school switcher, fee collection, receipts, attendance, homework, parent portal
Phase 2: Fix all issues found in testing
